title: glandora goulandrisiorum
intro: Glandora goulandrisiorum, also known as the Goulandris' Glandora, is a species of flowering plant in the family Solanaceae. It is native to Mexico and has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain cancer cells and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Glandora goulandrisiorum include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from its leaves and stems, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal purposes.
